{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged red arrow
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Forged]] red arrows are used by [[Emissaries]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Forged]] arrow is an illusionary volley that can be difficult to catch with the eye or spiritual sense.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
